actionType.description: The type of terminal action: **InstallAndroidApp**, **UninstallAndroidApp**, **InstallAndroidCertificate**, or **UninstallAndroidCertificate**.

config.description: Technical information about the terminal action.

confirmedAt.description: The date and time when the action was carried out.

id.description: The unique ID of the terminal action.

result.description: The result message for the action.

scheduledAt.description: The date and time when the action was scheduled to happen.

status.description: The status of the terminal action: **pending**, **successful**, **failed**, **cancelled**, or **tryLater**.

terminalId.description: The unique ID of the terminal that the action applies to.
